title: October 2025 newsletter: What's happening at the IAA
body: "The Immigration Advice Authority (IAA) has published the October edition of its quarterly newsletter – your trusted source for the latest updates on our work, policy developments, and key activities shaping the immigration advice sector.   In the October 2025 edition, you’ll find:      An update on the Immigration Services Commissioner role    A warm welcome to our new Head of Sector Development    Revised guidance on the Law Society’s Immigration and Asylum Law Accreditation    A chance to share your feedback on our online forms service     Whether you’re part of an organisation or simply committed to supporting safe, effective immigration advice in the UK, the IAA’s newsletters offer valuable insights, timely updates, and ways to stay involved in our work.   Download the October newsletter.   If you haven’t already, you can subscribe to receive future editions directly to your inbox by signing up to our mailing list. "
